nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Classic Set
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Classic Set | short_description: A quick sheet-pan dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans tossed in olive oil and herbs. | meal_suggestion: Serve wit
nodes.premise: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Classic Set - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Classic Set | short_description: A quick sheet-pan dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans tossed in olive oil and herbs. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a simple green salad or steamed greens to boost fiber. Season with herbs like rosemary or thyme. For more fiber, swap half the potatoes for sweet potatoes. Leftovers keep well in the fridge for 3–4 days. | nutrition_note: Lean pork tenderloin provides high-quality protein with minimal fat; potatoes supply complex carbs and potassium; green beans add fiber and micronutrients; olive oil delivers heart-healthy fats. For a standard 1-serving portion (about 4–6 oz pork, 1 cup potatoes, 1 cup green beans, 1 tbsp olive oil) expect roughly 30–35 g protein, 35–45 g carbs, 12–15 g fat (~400–500 kcal). To lower calories, use 1 tsp oil or load more veggies; to increase fiber, add a leafy side.

nodes.premise: Meal: Baked Cod Plate — Sesame Twist - name: Baked Cod Plate — Sesame Twist | short_description: Baked cod with roasted sweet potato and broccoli, finished with lemon for a bright, protein-rich plate. | meal_suggestion: Serve with quinoa or brown rice for extra fiber. If desired, garnish with sesame seeds or a light sesame oil drizzle to mirror the twist. | nutrition_note: Lean cod provides high-quality protein; sweet potato offers complex carbs and beta-carotene; broccoli adds fiber and micronutrients; lemon contributes vitamin C. Optional sesame seeds/oil can add healthy fats to match the 'Sesame Twist'.

nodes.premise: Meal: Turkey Meatballs & Pasta — Mild-Spice Set - name: Turkey Meatballs & Pasta — Mild-Spice Set | short_description: Lean turkey meatballs with whole-wheat pasta in tomato sauce, finished with parmesan for calcium and a mild spice profile. | meal_suggestion: Serve with steamed greens (e.g., broccoli or spinach) to add color and fiber. A typical portion: pasta with turkey meatballs in marinara, topped with parmesan. | nutrition_note: Lean turkey provides protein; whole-wheat pasta offers fiber and complex carbs; parmesan adds calcium. Tomato marinara adds micronutrients but can be high in sodium—use low-sodium sauce and moderate cheese for a lighter option; pair with vegetables for balance.
